summary: E3 Testing Complete: D.Lgs. 262/2005 as 8th compliance standard AND Audit Readiness Score in SOX Wizard. All 30 backend tests pass. Both features fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: All 30 pytest tests pass (including test_sox_readiness_score and test_eight_compliance_standards)
Backend: GET /api/compliance returns 8 standards including DLgs262 with code='DLgs262', progress=48, requirements_total=28, requirements_met=13
Backend: GET /api/policies includes 2 DLgs262 policies: 'Attestazione Dirigente Preposto' and 'Procedure Amministrativo-Contabili'
Backend: GET /api/agents includes 'Dirigente Preposto Assistant' agent with correct description
Backend: GET /api/audit includes 17 audit logs from 'Dirigente Preposto Assistant' agent (cluster 7 events)
Backend: GET /api/sox/readiness-score returns valid score with overall_score=18, label='NOT READY', gap_to_ready=62, 5 priority_controls, domain_scores, estimated_completion_days=13
Frontend: Landing page shows '8' for Regulations Covered stat
Frontend: Dashboard Overview shows '8 standards' in Compliance Score card
Frontend: Dashboard Compliance Progress chart shows DLgs262 at 48%
Frontend: Compliance page shows D.Lgs. 262/2005 card with correct data
Frontend: Policies page shows 2 DLgs262 policies with correct badges
Frontend: Policies page regulation dropdown includes 'DLgs262' option
Frontend: SOX Wizard shows Audit Readiness Score card with circular score (18), NOT READY badge, gap info (62 pts to 80%)
Frontend: SOX Wizard shows 5 priority controls sorted by impact_points with risk badges and +pts
Frontend: SOX Wizard priority controls have Update buttons
Frontend: ARIA assistant placeholder mentions D.Lgs. 262 in subtitle and empty state
seed_data_creation: D.Lgs. 262/2005 seeded via /app/backend/seed.py: 1 compliance standard (DLgs262), 2 policies (Attestazione Dirigente Preposto, Procedure Amministrativo-Contabili), 1 agent (Dirigente Preposto Assistant), 8 audit logs in cluster 7.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E3 features complete: D.Lgs. 262/2005 as 8th compliance standard and Audit Readiness Score in SOX Wizard. The readiness score uses weighted risk scoring (critical=10, high=7, medium=5, low=3). Current score is 18 (NOT READY) with 62 pts gap to 80%. The PATCH test in iteration_5 modified AC-01 status from 'completed' to 'in_progress', which reduced the score from ~23 to 18. All 30 backend tests pass. Previous iterations: iteration_4.json (E1 SOX Foundation), iteration_5.json (E2 SOX Wizard).

dlgs262_agent.name: Dirigente Preposto Assistant
dlgs262_agent.description: Supporta il dirigente preposto nella raccolta delle evidenze e nella redazione dell'attestazione semestrale ex art. 154-bis D.Lgs. 262/2005
